applicabilityConditions: The target expands a high-growth addressable market, Microsoft adds unique value, and transaction economics support long-term shareholder value.
recommendedAction: Commit to a bounded acquisition only after strategic reach, price discipline, and execution capacity are jointly supportable.
nonApplicabilityConditions: Strategic reach, transaction economics, or integration execution is not supportable.
guardrails: Do not treat transaction completion as value creation; retain explicit price and execution boundaries.
exceptions: Defer or reject when equivalent strategic reach is available with materially lower irreversible commitment.
reversalSignals: Expected strategic reach weakens, transaction economics deteriorate, or integration execution becomes unsupported.
